bias_detail: Configurable bias parameter for Linear layers and LayerNorms (default True)

components.name: Transformer Blocks
components.details: 12 Block modules, each containing LayerNorm, CausalSelfAttention, and MLP

components.name: Language Model Head
components.details: nn.Linear(n_embd, vocab_size, bias=False) with weight tying to token embeddings

components.name: MLP
components.details: Two Linear layers with GELU activation and dropout

components.name: CausalSelfAttention
components.details: Multi-head causal self-attention with Flash Attention support

total_params_estimate: 124M (default config), scalable to 1558M for GPT2-XL variant
